description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the java:8 Docker image. Define a variable JBAKE_VERSION set to 2.5.1 and a before_script that runs apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq unzip zip, curls https://get.sdkman.io | bash, writes sdkman_auto_answer=true to /root/.sdkman/etc/config, sources /root/.sdkman/bin/sdkman-init.sh, installs jbake $JBAKE_VERSION via sdk and selects it. Add a pages job (default stage) that runs jbake . public and publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact. No services, caches, or conditional rules are required.
